title: Lux's Pink Moon
description: A vanilla-enhancing resource pack that turns the moon a cute pink!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1320874825895383090/1320875087670284418/luxs_pink_moon_text.png?ex=676b3049&is=6769dec9&hm=8a2e9e5bc87172640a35855b1a149b45b55e6d5da6b5b67c73a601458ef66108&)

## **Minecraft: Java Edition - Pink Moon Resourcepack**

Are you tired of a bland white moon? Well, look no further! Download this aesthetic resource pack to enhance your previously boring celestial body to be more... Well, pink! You will now be able to look up into the night sky and see a cute, bright pink moon! Perfect for your cherry world! 🌸💖

---

---

## **Tips**

Place this pack on top of other packs to overwrite the moon and leave everything else the same! The only file modified is the moon phases texture.

Since the location of that texture hasn't changed, this pack can be used on virtually any modern version of Minecraft. Enjoy!
